title: 16 Inch Christmas Wreath, Outdoor Christmas Wreath with LED Lights 4 Red Artificial Poinsettia Flowers Ball Ornaments Pine Cones Berries for Door Wall Window Fireplace Home Decorations
features: ❀ [Combination of Rich Christmas Elements]: Our Christmas door wreath features combination of realistic pine branches, poinsettia flowers, pine cones, red berries and christmas ball ornaments. Rich details and charming design will bring a dense festive atmosphere.

🎄[Indoor and Outdoor Use Christmas Wreath]: Made of high quality PVC, plastic and cloth, our Christmas wreath could last for years. Diameter of this front door wreath is 16Inch (40cm). With 3 meters/30 lights,Proper size and premium material allow this artificial wreath be used indoors and outdoors.

🎄[Classic Christmas Door Wreath]: Using the traditional red & green color scheme, this artificial christmas wreath is the perfect Christmas ornament for winter holiday festival decoration in your home.

🎄[Multiple Occasion Decoration]: This artificial Christmas wreath is a great addtion as Christmas home decoration. Perfect for decorating front door, wall, window, fireplace, cabinet, living room, Christmas Party, hotel or other place you like.

🎄【Reliable after-sales service】We specialize in decorating various gatherings, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and Christmas parties.If you have any questions of the Vibrant & Captivating Christmas Wreaths.Please contact us and we will provide you 100% satisfaction service at any time
